name: Google Places
description: Google Places API (New v1) — search local businesses by text query or nearby radius, get full place details (phone, website, hours, ratings, reviews) and photos. The single most useful source for local SMB lead lists. Uses field masks: pass a comma-separated `fields` value to control which fields are returned (cheaper queries).

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: Google Cloud API key with the Places API (New) enabled. Create at console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials.

tools.name: search_text
tools.description: Search for businesses/places by free-form text query. Best for 'find marketing agencies in Lyon' style prospecting. Returns up to 20 results per page (use pageToken for more, max 60 total). Supports filters by type, price level, open-now, rating, and location bias.

textQuery.description: Free-form query, e.g. 'marketing agency in Lyon France' or 'dental clinics 75011 Paris'

includedType.description: Restrict to a single Place type (e.g. 'restaurant', 'dentist', 'lawyer'). See Google's table of place types.

pageToken.description: Pagination token from a previous response

locationBias.description: Bias results to a region: { circle: { center: {latitude, longitude}, radius } } or { rectangle: { low, high } }

locationRestriction.description: Hard-restrict results to a region (same shape as locationBias)

tools.name: search_nearby
tools.description: Find places within a circular radius of a point. Use when you have a lat/lng and want every dentist/agency/etc within X meters. Up to 20 results per call.

locationRestriction.description: { circle: { center: { latitude, longitude }, radius: 0–50000 meters } }

tools.name: get_place
tools.description: Get full details for a place by its resource name (e.g. 'places/ChIJ...'). Returns name, address, phone (national + international), website, hours, ratings, reviews, types, and photos. Use a narrow X-Goog-FieldMask in the request to keep cost down.

placeId.description: Google Place ID (the bare id, no 'places/' prefix)

tools.name: autocomplete
tools.description: Predict places/queries from a partial input string. Useful for resolving fuzzy user input ('Schwartz Lyon') to a Place ID before calling get_place.
